meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio trap. Use this intermediate guide to deploy professional SaaS projects using Antigravity and Claude Code to win more clients.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by shipping high-fidelity, production-ready SaaS templates. By leveraging the Antigravity framework with Claude Code, you can architect, build, and deploy a complex application in hours, not weeks. This approach creates a repeatable, high-value asset that proves your technical authority to potential clients immediately.
content.intro:
The cold silence of a blank portfolio is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, but the market demands proof—a tangible, high-performance SaaS product that signals you aren't just a coder, but an architect. Clients don't buy code; they buy the confidence that you can handle their vision.

Stop waiting for the perfect client to build your first project. Using the Antigravity framework, you can bootstrap a sophisticated, scalable application that showcases your ability to handle modern stacks. With Claude Code, you turn your intent into execution, effectively manufacturing the experience you need to command premium rates.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish a clear scope for your portfolio project. Focus on a high-utility tool like a CRM or project management dashboard to demonstrate database relationships and auth handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean architecture for a SaaS project management tool. Include folder structure for Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. Define core data models for users, projects, and tasks.

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using the Antigravity template to ensure industry-standard best practices and type safety from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard template. Ensure all environment variables, linting, and formatting configurations are set for a production-grade application.

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on the primary feature set, ensuring clean API routes and secure database queries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the CRUD operations for project tasks. Add server-side validation and ensure all database queries are type-safe with the established schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement task management API routes with Supabase integration'

steps.title: Polish UI/UX with Component Systems
steps.description: Elevate the visual aesthetic to reflect premium quality. Use the Antigravity design system to maintain consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refine the dashboard UI using the Antigravity component library. Apply a professional dark-mode theme and ensure responsive layouts for all viewports.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update dashboard layout with responsive grid and professional typography'

steps.title: Deploy and Portfolio Integration
steps.description: Deploy your project to a live environment and document the technical challenges you solved to create your case study.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment-ready configuration for Vercel. Also, write a summary of the technical challenges solved for a portfolio case study entry.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'prepare deployment config and summarize technical stack for documentation'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Technical Challenges' markdown file in your repo; clients value the 'how' as much as the 'what'.
Use mock data that mimics real-world complexity, such as nested API responses, to show you can handle messy data structures.
Implement a robust 'README.md' that includes a high-level architecture diagram; it signals senior-level engineering maturity.
Record a 60-second Loom walk-through of the code structure to embed in your portfolio; it builds immense trust during the sales process.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a specific pain point rather than building a bloated, generic template.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, share the link on LinkedIn with a technical breakdown, and reach out to three local businesses offering a free audit of their current web tools.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the exact workflow to turn a blank screen into a client-winning asset. Stop waiting for the perfect project and start building your authority today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
